description_for_human: AI agent orchestration platform — deploy multi-agent workflows, schedule tasks with cron, and manage agents via Discord or Dashboard.
description_for_model: Tetora is an AI agent orchestration platform. Use this to look up documentation on deploying agents, configuring workflows, scheduling tasks, setting up Discord integration, and managing multi-agent teams. Supports Claude (claude-code CLI and Anthropic API), OpenAI, and local models.
